sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22216" key="glaga/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γλᾰγ-άω</orth>, <sense id="n22216.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be milky, juicy</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">γλαγόωντι σπέρματι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.384.23</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
